title: AbundantEmeraldOre
description: This mod adds emerald ore to every biome.
body: ## What It Do This mod does simply one thing and one thing only, adds emerald ore to every single biome in Minecraft. It is as rare as it is in jungles and it does not get rarer as you down like usual just for that extra emerald. ## Extra Stuff If you want to support me go to my Kofi or join our discord! Also if you have any questions or suggestions (or even a random mod request like this) at all feel free to comment on the page or join our Discord. Oh also dependency is Fabric API which I think is an obvious given since I think all fabric mods require it but whatever. ### Support me :3
